novel.title: Project ITHIHASA
novel.author: System Admin
novel.synopsis: In a world where the laws of physics have been rewritten by the 'System', one man discovers the hidden truth behind the ruined reality.

chapters.title: The First Way
chapters.content:
There are three ways to survive in a ruined world. Now, I have forgotten a few, but one thing is certain. The fact that you who are reading this will survive. 

This is a story about a world that has come to an end. A world where the 'System' has taken over every aspect of human life. 

I looked up at the sky. It wasn't blue anymore. It was a digital void, filled with scrolling lines of code that only I could see.

chapters.title: The Second Way
chapters.content:
The second way is simpler, yet far more dangerous. It involves embracing the very thing that destroyed us. 

I felt the cold metal of the interface against my temple. 'Link Start,' I whispered. 

The world dissolved into a flurry of pixels. The pain was sharp, but the clarity was worth it. I was no longer just a man; I was a node in the network.

chapters.title: The Ruined Reality
chapters.content: Drafting the third way... The reality we knew is gone. What remains is a shadow, a simulation running on a dying star.
